creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Since a couple of weeks for now bib2ris, as part of refdb software package, dies converting BibTeX files to RIS files using the tool with a bus error on all of our FreeBSD 8.0 boxes running amd64-OS:

ohartmann: bib2ris literatur.bib >literatur.ris 
literatur.bib, line 4, warning: 45 characters of junk seen at toplevel
literatur.bib, line 2190, warning: found " at brace-depth zero in string (TeX accents in BibTeX should be inside braces)
lexical buffer overflowed (reallocating to 4000 bytes)
lexical buffer overflowed (reallocating to 6000 bytes)
literatur.bib, name 3, warning: empty name
Assertion failed: ((run->regs_mask[elm] & (1U << bit)) == 0), function arena_run_reg_dalloc, file /usr/src/lib/libc/stdlib/malloc.c, line 2543.
Abort trap: 6
ohartmann:

How-To-Repeat: Try converting BibTeX files to RIS files using bib2ris on FreeBSD 8.0-CURRENT/amd64
